title: Forage Breeding
description: Why do humans breed new cultivar(variety)? What is the contribution of fine cultivars to the development of human society? "Forage breeding" integrates the theory and technology of genetics and other related disciplines to explore the theory and general procedures of cultivating new cultivars of high-yield and high-quality forage. The purpose is to comprehensively improve the heredity of forage and forage crops, and create new cultivars of forage and forage crops that meet people’s living needs.
